sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5317" key="a)mmemi/cetai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμμεμίξεται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμμένω</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναμεμίξεται, ἀναμένω.</foreign> </entryFree>
